hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; [ ! -f "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.c|*.h|*.R|*.r|*.Rd|*.md|*.Rmd|*.yaml|*.yml|*.tex) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; bad=$(LC_ALL=C grep -nP '[^\x00-\x7F]' "$f" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$bad" ]; then printf 'Non-ASCII bytes found in %s:
%s
Replace with ASCII (em-dash -> --, arrow -> ->, ellipsis -> ..., curly quotes -> straight, etc.) and retry.
' "$f" "$bad" >&2; exit 2; fi; }
